#+TITLE: Documentation Templates Overview

* Available Templates



* Usage

1. Copy template files to your project
2. Fill in bracketed placeholders [like this]
3. Remove placeholder text
4. Customize for your specific project needs

* Document Relationships

AGENTS.org (barrel/overview)
├── requirements.org (vision, features, non-goals)
├── tech-stack.org (dependencies and tools)
├── design.org (system design, key decisions, trade-offs)
├── architecture.org (detailed implementation, components, data flow, APIs)
├── coding-standards.org (naming, formatting, patterns)
└── file-organization.org (folder structure)
